metadata.description: CLI and agent skills for investigating GitHub PR review comments and presenting human-approved action plans

plugins.name: resolve-reviews
plugins.description: Investigate all PR review comments and require human approval before fixes, replies, resolves, commits, pushes, or watch processing

plugins.name: resolve-agent-reviews
plugins.description: Investigate PR review bot findings and require human approval before fixes, replies, resolves, commits, pushes, or watch processing

plugins.name: resolve-human-reviews
plugins.description: Investigate human PR review comments and require human approval before fixes, replies, resolves, commits, pushes, or watch processing
